purpose: Canonical marker files the scanner recognizes on every scan.

folder_markers.purpose: Machine-readable folder profile: role, safety policy, counts, hashes, source scan id, and scanner version.
Human-readable inventory of files in the folder, file families, tags, and move status.
Folder symptom diagnosis, confidence, recommended plan, and risk explanation.

file_sidecars.purpose: File metadata, hashes, source path, timestamps, scanner confidence, and reader results.
Meaning/domain/coherence labels from CHI and NLP pipelines.
Human-readable notes, operator decisions, and review comments.
Deletion/deprecation marker. A cleanup job must import and review this before anything is removed.

scan_rules: Read marker files before classifying the folder.
If markers are stale, rescan and update rather than ignoring them.
If sidecar exists without source file, classify as orphan_sidecar and send to review.
If source file exists without sidecar in an approved root, propose or create sidecars depending on automation level.
Before delete/archive, pull all protected extensions into SQLite and require a ledger entry.
